message:
fix(persist,server): handle RDB eviction opcodes and optimize pub/sub client lookup

RDB persistence (fr-persist):
- Handle RDB_OPCODE_IDLE (0xF8) and RDB_OPCODE_FREQ (0xF9) opcodes that appear
  in Redis 4.0+ RDB files when maxmemory-policy uses LRU/LFU eviction — these
  were previously treated as unknown type bytes, causing InvalidFrame errors
  when loading RDB files from real Redis instances
- Extend pending_expire guard to also recognize eviction opcodes as valid
  predecessors to type bytes

Server pub/sub delivery optimization (fr-server):
- Add client_id_to_token HashMap for O(1) pub/sub message routing instead of
  O(n) linear scan through all client connections on every message delivery
- Maintain the index on connection accept (insert) and close (remove)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
